products.title: ORYN BPC-157
products.subtitle: Healing & Recovery
products.description: Body Protection Compound-157 is a synthetic peptide derived from a naturally occurring protein in gastric juice. ORYN BPC-157 is formulated at pharmaceutical grade in a precision-dosed pen system for consistent, reliable administration over 30 days.

products.title: ORYN TB-500
products.subtitle: Tissue Repair
products.description: Thymosin Beta-4 fragment, TB-500, plays a crucial role in tissue repair and regeneration. ORYN TB-500 delivers a precise 15mg dose in our advanced pen system.

products.title: ORYN CJC-1295
products.subtitle: GH Stimulation
products.description: CJC-1295 is a synthetic analogue of growth hormone-releasing hormone (GHRH). ORYN CJC-1295 provides sustained GH elevation through our precision dosing system.

products.title: ORYN Ipamorelin
products.subtitle: GH Stimulation
products.description: Ipamorelin is a selective growth hormone secretagogue that stimulates the pituitary gland. ORYN Ipamorelin offers targeted GH release.

products.title: ORYN Tirzepatide Pen
products.subtitle: Metabolic
products.description: Tirzepatide is a dual GIP/GLP-1 receptor agonist. ORYN Tirzepatide pen delivers precision dosing for metabolic research.

products.title: ORYN GHK-CU
products.subtitle: Skin Repair
products.description: GHK-Cu (Copper peptide) is a naturally occurring tripeptide with a high affinity for copper ions. ORYN GHK-CU supports skin remodeling research.

products.title: ORYN Glutathione
products.subtitle: Antioxidant
products.description: Glutathione is the body's master antioxidant. ORYN Glutathione delivers a powerful 6g dose via our precision pen system.

products.title: ORYN NAD+
products.subtitle: Metabolic & Anti-Aging
products.description: Nicotinamide Adenine Dinucleotide (NAD+) is a critical coenzyme present in every cell. ORYN NAD+ pen delivers a concentrated 500mg dose.

products.title: ORYN MediT Pen
products.subtitle: Tirzepatide 40mg - Weight Management
products.description: The ORYN MediT Pen is a prefilled, single-use injection pen containing 40mg Tirzepatide. Dual GIP/GLP-1 hormone action for metabolic support.

products.title: ORYN NovaDose NAD+
products.subtitle: Youth In Your Hands
products.description: NovaDose delivers pharmaceutical-grade NAD+ through an innovative cartridge-based pen system. Designed for precise daily microdosing.
